final:
module JK_latch(
    input wire obf_J,
    input wire K,
    input wire clk,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (obf_J && ~K) begin
            Q <= 1; // Set
        end else if (~obf_J && K) begin
            Q <= 0; // Reset
        end else if (obf_J && K) begin
            Q <= ~Q; // Toggle
        end
        // If obf_J and K are both low, Q retains its previous value
    end
endmodule
